existing_features.title: Create a language context provider that manages the currently selected language (English, Hindi, Odia) with default set to English, and persists the selection to localStorage so the choice survives page reloads.

Add a language switcher UI element in the Header component, displaying three options: 'English', 'हिन्दी' (Hindi), and 'ଓଡ଼ିଆ' (Odia). The switcher should be visible on both desktop and mobile (hamburger menu) layouts and highlight the currently active language.

Create a centralized translations file (e.g., frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts) containing all user-facing strings for every component in all three languages: English, Hindi, and Odia. Cover all text content in Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, WhyChooseUs, WarrantyGuarantee, Services, InquiryForm, BankFinanceBanner, WhatsAppSection, and Footer.

Update all page-section components (Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, WhyChooseUs, WarrantyGuarantee, Services, InquiryForm, BankFinanceBanner, WhatsAppSection, Footer, Header) to consume translated strings from the language context instead of rendering hard-coded text, so the entire page re-renders in the selected language when the user switches.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add multilingual support with English, Hindi, and Odia language options for viewers
